---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for WaveStream
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. ("I'm frustrated when …")

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Origin (optional)**
If this feature exists in CloudStream or Nuvio, link to the upstream
source so we can credit it properly when porting.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant.
